components.value: S, M/DF (a small bladder filled with air)

The air bubble allows the creature touched to breathe underwater or in similar airless environments, or protects the object touched from water damage. A firearm within an air bubble can be loadedâassuming the black powder comes from a powder horn, a cartridge, or some other airtight protective deviceâand fired.
